name: Flat Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set your shoulders down and back before each rep.
Lower with control and keep wrists stacked.
Drive through the full range without bouncing.
tips: Think chest up, shoulders packed, and smooth reps.

name: Squat
instructions: Keep your feet planted and stable.
Move through a comfortable full range.
Maintain a neutral spine while you lift.
tips: Record a side-view set to check depth and spine position.

name: Crunches
instructions: Brace your core before every rep.
Use smooth tempo and controlled breathing.
Stop each set with 1–2 reps in reserve.
tips: Stay technical first; intensity comes after good form.

name: Cable Row
instructions: Keep your torso stable throughout each set.
Control both lifting and lowering phases.
Match your range of motion rep to rep.
tips: Keep reps repeatable and progress load gradually.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Keep your torso stable throughout each set.
Control both lifting and lowering phases.
Match your range of motion rep to rep.
tips: Keep reps repeatable and progress load gradually.

name: Pull Down

tips: Keep reps repeatable and progress load gradually.

name: Leg Press Heavy
instructions: Keep knees tracking over toes.
Push through your mid-foot and heel.
Avoid rushing the eccentric phase.
common_mistakes: Letting hips shift side to side.
tips: Stability first, then add weight week by week.

name: RDL Heavy
instructions: Keep knees tracking over toes.
Push through your mid-foot and heel.
Avoid rushing the eccentric phase.
common_mistakes: Letting hips shift side to side.
tips: Stability first, then add weight week by week.
